description: Plugin-distributed hooks for claude-app-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable Claude-app anti-patterns in source files (.py/.ts/.js/.tsx/.jsx) — (1) hardcoded sk-ant- API key, (2) a Messages API call with no max_tokens anywhere in the file, (3) a retired model id (claude-2/claude-instant/claude-1), (4) full-message logging (print(messages)/console.log(messages)). Set CLAUDE_APP_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
